basics.name: Benjamin Hayden Duncan
basics.label: AI/ML Engineer & Technical Product Owner
basics.summary: AI/ML Engineer and Technical Product Owner with a background in MLOps, scalable Data Platforms, and Systems Engineering. Expert in leading cross-functional agile teams through the full product lifecycle, from concept generation to production deployment on Kubernetes and AWS.

work.name: Onebrief Inc.
work.summary: Architecting and implementing scalable AI services for edge computing and constrained environments.
highlights: Architected a scalable, modular inference service for deploying LLMs on Kubernetes in air-gapped environments
Engineered RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines for secure document summarization and intelligence extraction
Developed custom layout detection algorithms and OCR services for complex military documentation
Optimized model inference performance using vLLM and NVIDIA Triton for low-latency delivery

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.position: Machine Learning Engineer Sr. / Product Owner
work.summary: Full-lifecycle leadership of MLOps platforms and data-driven product strategy.
highlights: Wore several hats in designing, building, and deploying ML and data products in an agile environment
Generated product vision, interfaced with customers, and executed from concept generation to product offering
Standardized MLOps workflows using Kubeflow pipelines, reducing model deployment time by 40%
Designed and maintained resilient Kubernetes infrastructure on AWS to support TB-scale model training
Owned ML operations including Kubeflow pipelines, models registry development, and model framework tools
Established a centralized model registry and framework-agnostic deployment tools for diverse engineering teams

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.summary: Selective three-year rotational program for high-potential leaders involving cross-disciplinary technical rotations.
highlights: Completed high-impact rotations across Systems, Software, and Data Engineering domains
Participated in a selective, rotational program consisting of leadership development and technical training
Awarded for technical excellence in defense system integration and agile project management

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.position: Software Engineer - Data Platform & Product Owner
work.summary: Driving technical strategy for large-scale data storage and analytics platforms.
highlights: Led an agile scrum team in the development of a large-scale data storage and retrieval platform
Design normalized PostgreSQL catalog for inventorying terabytes of diverse data assets in S3 object storage
Designed Airflow ETL pipelines for ingesting structured and unstructured data from various sources
Built Python interfaces and tools for querying, storing, and accessing data assets using clean code principles
Owned the development of a scalable distributed data solution utilizing S3, Presto, and PostgreSQL

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.position: Software Engineer - Data Analytics & Scrum Master
work.summary: Facilitating agile delivery of expert systems and telemetry analysis tools.
highlights: Developed advanced data analysis tools and Expert Systems using Python
Served as Scrum Master for teams delivering advanced telemetry visualization tools using Python and Tableau
Held responsibility for defining the roadmap, backlog grooming, sprint planning, and reporting to management
Generated and prepared simulated missile telemetry data for ingestion into Machine Learning pipelines
Developed Python and Tableau tools for data processing, analysis, and visualization

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.summary: Ensuring mission success through rigorous environmental and E3 qualification.
highlights: Led verification testing for missile guidance sections, ensuring compliance with MIL-STD-810/464/461
Managed complex hardware-in-the-loop (HWIL) testing schedules in classified environments using JIRA KanBan
Streamlined requirements verification workflows, reducing testing cycles by 15%
Navigated complex security environments involving classified assets, facilities, and equipment

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.summary: Designing complex system architectures using Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE).
highlights: Developed detailed hardware/software systems architecture using SysML with Rhapsody
Interfaced with customers and utilized DOORS to create, capture, link, and manage requirements
Developed system-level specifications and DoDAF architecture views
Created DXL scripts, VBA tools, and procedures to automate repetitive processes, saving 100+ manual hours per month
Regularly prepared and presented architectural content to customers and internal reviewers

volunteer.summary: Leading a non-profit organization focused on community fundraising and social impact.
highlights: Spearheaded fundraising initiatives that raised over $500,000 for local charities
Led a local non-profit in planning events and fundraising to support those in need
